programmes.show_description: ...Witness: Mystery drama starring Taylor Cole. When a reporter uncovers a murder at her sister's wedding venue, she finds herself with an unexpected knack for crime solving (2019).
...Haunted By Murder: Spooky mystery with Candace Cameron Bure. Aida plans to flip a house where a teenage Aurora once discovered a body. The death was deemed accidental - but was it really? (2022)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

Thriller starring Gina Simms. After a neighbour is killed in a botched robbery, a woman launches a neighbourhood watch - only to uncover secrets far more dangerous than she expected. (2021)
Dark thriller with Samaire Armstrong. After years in a mental hospital, Megan visits her brother, only to find no one even remembers him. Is she losing her mind or is a sinister plot in play (2019)?

Good Cop, Dead Cop: Mary Shannon is a Deputy U.S. Marshal for the Federal Witness Security Program - the department responsible for the relocation and protection of state witnesses.
Sleeper: Castle searches for what happened to him during the two-months he was missing by piecing together snapshots from his recurring dreams. His search for the truth has consequences.
Mystery drama starring Jill Wagner. A murder at a campus book festival has police pointing fingers - but one sharp professor believes the real killer is still hiding in plain sight. (2019)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Mystery drama starring Jill Wagner. A murder at a campus book festival has police pointing fingers - but one sharp professor believes the real killer is still hiding in plain sight. (2019)
Murder Blues: Dr Sloan investigates a councillor's claims that he has been framed for the murder of his wife. Can he and Steve prove whether the politician is innocent of murder?
Open and Shut: The team investigates the murder of a teenage girl who had just celebrated her 18th Birthday. Dr Sloan has his suspicions concerning a suspect's alibi.
Nan's Ghost Part 1: Will a ghost story lead Jessica to danger or ancient treasure during a trip to Ireland? Part 1 of 2.
Nan's Ghost Part 2: Concluding episode. Can Jessica escape the prison of Ballynook Castle and find a murderer? Part 2 of 2.
He Said, She Said: Sue is blamed when a botched undercover operation ends with the death of an agent. Can the team help to prove her innocence?
In Plane Sight: As Castle and Alexis travel to London, their routine flight hits some turbulence when the plane's Air Marshal is found murdered.
The Following Sea: Carrie goes undercover at a marina to try and locate a key witness who has mysteriously disappeared.
To Serge with Love: Mary Shannon is a Deputy U.S. Marshal for the Federal Witness Security Program - the department responsible for the relocation and protection of state witnesses.
...For Murder: Crime mystery starring Jewel. When Shannon finds a body in the house she's been hired to renovate, can this unlikely sleuth dust off the clues and crack a murder case too? (2017)
